headline: Ph fintech GCash launches country's first AI financial coach embedded in e-wallet to strengthen financial literacy
summary: Reinforcing its role in advancing financial literacy and inclusion nationwide, finance super app GCash introduces the Philippines' first artificial intelligence–powered financial coach to be embedded in an e-wallet.
